title: Sign Shop
description: A simple remake of the sign shop plugin.
body:
![Signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c13e1bcfeee21009dcf78fa4a171a6b82efaf2_0.webp)Are Supports Fabric + Paper

Works on all signs (Support for hanging sign soon... maybe)
You need:
- 1 Sign
- 1 Chest
- 1 Wooden Hoe
  
Place your sign and type "[Shop]" on the top line then do the commands,
- /signshop price [Price] [Price Item]
- /signshop sell [Amount of item to sell at a time] [Item you are selling]

The with the hoe, click on your chest, then click on the sign.

When the shop is in stock, the sign will glow. If that sign is out of stock, it will turn red.

There are a few issues with items with long names, fixes coming soon.
